指定方向に素早く4回斬撃を放ち、1回につき範囲内のすべての敵に210（210+追:
Fires 4 quick slashes in the specified direction, dealing 210 (210 + 65% of additional physical attack) physical damage to all enemies within range each time. If an enemy hero is among the enemies hit, each slash will restore 300 HP (300 + 4.5% of additional HP).
When hitting a non-hero unit, the recovery effect is halved.
序盤は無理なトレードを避け、安全にファームしてコアアイテムとクールダウン短縮を揃: In the early stages, avoid unnecessary trades and focus on farming safely to get core items and cooldown reduction. From the mid-game onwards, use your mobility to push the side lanes and launch a surprise attack on the enemy's carries. The basic strategy is to instantly close the distance with a combo that combines flash and skills, and immediately after inflicting silence with the twin swords, switch to the heavy sword and inflict burst damage all at once.
序盤から高いベースダメージとコンボ火力を誇り、スノーボール性能に優れる。: It boasts high base damage and combo firepower from the early stages, and has excellent snowball performance.
無敵スキルと圧倒的なバーストダメージで、接近戦においてナコルルを逆に倒し切れるた: With his invincibility skills and overwhelming burst damage, he can defeat Nakoruru in close combat.
ラプールが強力な範囲CCと防御力アップを提供し、黄忠を安全に砲撃させることができ: Because Lapool provides strong range CC and defense up, allowing Huangzhong to fire safely.
ジャングラーとして序盤は無駄なくファームを行い、素早くレベル4と必須装備を揃える: As a jungler, in the early stages, focus on farming without wasting anything and quickly getting level 4 and essential equipment. Once your equipment is ready, use your mobility to attack mages and marksmen with low health, and fulfill your role as an assassin by instantly dissolving them. In group fights, instead of taking the lead, wait for the enemy's main CC to be used up and then aim for carries from the sides or behind, using Skill 1's invincibility to prevent counterattacks and secure a kill.
敵を引き付けたり削ったりすることで、悟空が安全に飛び込んでキルを拾いやすくなるた: Because by attracting and grinding down enemies, it becomes easier for Goku to safely jump in and pick up kills.

水域（川やスキルで生成した水溜まり）にいると、強力なノックバックなどのCC能力が: When you are in a body of water (a river or a puddle created by a skill), CC abilities such as strong knockback will be strengthened.
操作がシンプルで直感的に扱いやすく、初心者でも安定して役割を果たせる。: The operation is simple and intuitive, and even beginners can perform their tasks reliably.
指定位置に4つの魔法バリアを召喚する。敵がバリアに触れるとバリアは消失し、ターゲ: Summons 4 magic barriers at the specified location. When an enemy touches the barrier, the barrier disappears, dealing 360 (360 + 75% of magic attack) magic damage and stunning the target for 0.75 seconds. When the stun ends, the enemy's movement speed is reduced by 25% for 0.5 seconds. Enemies who come into contact with the barrier again within a short period of time will receive half the damage they receive. Stun effects do not stack, but movement speed is reduced by 25% for 1.25 seconds.
重剣装備時: When equipped with a heavy sword
低リソースでもマップ全体に影響を与えられる高いローム・サポート適性。: High roam support aptitude that can affect the entire map even with low resources.
通常攻撃とパッシブによるステップ移動で優れたカイト（引き撃ち）性能を持ち、機動力: It has excellent kite performance with normal attacks and passive step movement, and is highly mobile.
敵の防御力を下げつつ視界を取るサポートができ、蘭陵王のバーストダメージを最大限に: This is because it can support the enemy by lowering their defense power and taking their vision, and maximizes Lanlingou's burst damage.
張良のUltを強力なシールドや妨害スキルで阻止し、味方を守る能力が高いため。: He has a strong ability to protect his allies by blocking Zhang Liang's ultimate with powerful shields and interference skills.
敵のスキルを一度防ぐことのできる護身呪を念じ始める。護身呪は最大1.5秒間持続す:
I begin to think of a self-defense spell that can block the enemy's skills. Self-defense spells last up to 1.5 seconds. If you successfully block an enemy's skill, you will gain invincibility for 0.2 seconds and a shield of 859 (600 + 150% of physical attack + 15% of additional HP) for 4 seconds.
When you activate the skill, your movement speed increases by 40% for 1 second.
スキル1の「沈黙」効果により、スキル依存度の高い敵や高機動力のヒーローを封殺でき: Skill 1's "silence" effect can suppress highly skill-dependent enemies and highly mobile heroes.
聖光の守護を獲得し、2秒ごとにHPを120（120+追加HPの2.5%）回復する: Gain Holy Light Protection and recover 120 HP (120 + 2.5% of additional HP) every 2 seconds. While movement speed is reduced, recover an additional 120 HP (120 + 2.5% of additional HP) every 2 seconds.
指定方向に突進し、ルート上の敵に800（800+魔法攻撃の110%）の魔法ダメー: Charges in the specified direction, dealing 800 (800 + 110% of magic attack) magic damage to enemies along the route and knocking them back. Enemies hit will have their physical attacks reduced by 20% for 2.5 seconds. You can recover 25 energy when you hit an enemy.
防御力やCCが高く、悟空のバーストダメージを耐え凌ぎながら反撃できるため。: He has high defense and CC, and is able to withstand Goku's burst damage and counterattack.
単純な正面突破には不向きで、敵の防衛網が整っていると活躍の場が制限される。: It is not suitable for a simple frontal breakthrough, and if the enemy's defense network is in place, the field of action will be limited.
如意棒を地面に突き刺し、範囲内の敵に250（250+追加物理攻撃の80%）の物理:
Stab the Nyoi stick into the ground, dealing 250 (250 + 80% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies within range and knocking them up for 1 second.
Gives 3 stacks of engravings to enemies within range. When a normal attack hits an enemy with the engraving, it consumes one stack of the engraving and deals an additional 270 physical damage.
発動から1.5秒後にステルス状態になる（持続時間24秒）。ステルス状態が解除され: Enters stealth state 1.5 seconds after activation (duration: 24 seconds). When you break out of stealth, your attack speed increases by 50% for 5 seconds. Staying near an enemy hero for more than 3 seconds will break stealth.
散弾銃で4発の弾丸を発射する。中側の2発は敵ヒーローに87（物理攻撃の50%）の:
Fires 4 bullets with a shotgun. The two middle bullets deal 87 (50% of physical attack) physical damage to enemy heroes, and the outer bullets deal 52 (30% of physical attack) physical damage to enemy heroes. Gain 1 stack of Combat Instinct for each bullet that hits an enemy hero, each stack increasing Physical Defense Penetration by 5-10 for 6 seconds (up to a maximum of 12 stacks).
Only the middle two bullets can trigger critical hits and equipment effects. Towers are not affected by additional effects from bullets.
敵のCC（行動妨害）に非常に弱く、コンボ中に止められると何もできずに倒されやすい: It is extremely vulnerable to enemy CC (control), and if it is stopped during a combo, it is likely to be defeated without being able to do anything.
前線で敵のCCを受け止め、右京が安全にUltを発動できる環境を作るため。: To create an environment where Ukyo can safely activate his ultimate by blocking the enemy's CC on the front lines.
バリアや魔法陣を用いた優れたゾーニングと視界確保能力。: Excellent zoning and visibility ability using barriers and magic circles.
悟空が接近したところに範囲ダメージとダメージ軽減を合わせ、逆に倒し切ることができ: This is because you can combine area damage and damage reduction when Goku approaches and defeat him.
ミッドレーンまたはロームとして運用し、序盤は安全にファームとウェーブクリアに専念: Operate as a mid laner or roamer, focusing on safely farming and clearing waves in the early stages. Once you have mastered the ultimate, you should actively roam to the side lanes and work with your allies to aim for a kill. In team fights, always take a position behind your allies and be sure to use your ultimate against enemy assassins and carries to neutralize them.
圧倒的な機動力で一気に距離を詰められ、柔らかいエリンを瞬殺できる強力なアサシンの: She is a powerful assassin who can quickly close the distance with her overwhelming mobility and instantly kill the soft Erin.
次回の通常攻撃が抜刀斬りに変化する。抜刀斬りは2秒間射程が増加し、ターゲットに4:
The next normal attack will change to a batto slash. Battou Slash has increased range for 2 seconds, deals 40 (40 + 35% of additional physical attack) physical damage to the target, and reduces movement speed by 15%-30% (increases based on hero level). Deals an additional 80 (80 + 70% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies at the edge of the attack range, and restores own HP by 125 (125 + 2% of additional HP) (half effect against non-hero units).
Battou Slash can be activated once every 5 to 4 seconds (shortened depending on hero level). Every time you deal damage with a skill, the CD of Battou Slash is reduced by 0.5 seconds.
アルティメットの発動中にCCを受けると中断され、耐久力の低さが露呈しやすい。: If you receive CC while your ultimate is active, it will be interrupted and your low durability will likely be exposed.
通常攻撃またはスキルによるダメージの間隔が1.5秒以内の場合、ターゲットへの連続: If the interval between normal attacks or skill damage is less than 1.5 seconds, enter a continuous attack state on the target, dealing 120 (120 + 70% of magic attack) true damage every 1.2 seconds.
高い機動力で張良のスキルを回避し、一瞬で距離を詰めてバーストダメージを出せるため: With its high mobility, it can evade Zhang Liang's skills, close the distance in an instant, and deal burst damage.
優れた機動力でマップを素早く駆け回り、プレップレッシャーを与えやすい。: With its excellent mobility, it can quickly move around the map and easily apply pressure.

機動力と回復を提供し、舞がヒット＆アウェイの立ち回りをしやすくなるため。: It provides mobility and recovery, making it easier for Mai to perform hit-and-away attacks.
序盤のレーン戦が強いファイターやサステイン（回復力）の高いタンクを相手にすると、: If you play against a fighter with strong early lane play or a tank with high sustain (recovery), it's easy to fall behind in farming.
接近前に強力なCCチェーンを受けると、重剣モードで耐える前に倒されてしまう。: If you receive a strong CC chain before approaching, you will be defeated before you can withstand it in heavy sword mode.
ゴールデンフォレストの祝福を受け、エネルギーを全回復。即座にパッシブ効果（移動速: Receive the blessing of the Golden Forest and fully recover your energy. At the same time, nullifies movement speed reduction and increases attack speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
スキルで視界を確保できるため、蘭陵王のステルスによる奇襲を事前に察知して対策され: Because they can secure their visibility with their skills, they can detect King Lanling's stealth surprise attack in advance and take countermeasures.
軽剣を抜剣し薙ぎ払い、付近の敵に377（200+物理攻撃の110%）の物理ダメー:
Unsheathes a light sword and slashes it, dealing 377 (200 + 110% of physical attack) physical damage to nearby enemies and increasing attack speed by 60%. Duration is 5 seconds.
When Legend of the Dual Swords draws his light sword, he can activate the light sword skill and his movement speed increases by 40.
他のマークスマン同様に耐久力が低く、アサシンのバーストダメージや不意のエンゲージ: Like other marksmen, he has low durability and is vulnerable to Assassin's burst damage and unexpected engagement.
回避不可能なハードCCで舞のコンボを妨害し、彼女の機動力を完全に無力化できるため: This is because you can disrupt Mai's combo with an unavoidable hard CC and completely neutralize her mobility.
ブリンクスキルによる機動力とアルティメットの回復効果により、粘り強く戦える。: The mobility of the blink skill and the recovery effect of the ultimate allow you to fight tenaciously.
指定方向に暗影の短剣を放ち、ルート上の敵に165（165+追加物理攻撃の57%）:
Fires a dark dagger in the specified direction, dealing 165 (165 + 57% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route and reducing movement speed by 90% (recovers over 2 seconds). Enemies hit by the dagger are marked and receive physical damage equal to 24% of their maximum HP after 3 seconds.
Attacking a marked enemy again will instantly stun the enemy for 1 second and recover 140 HP (140 + 60% of additional physical attack).
指定方向に扇子を投げ、最初に命中した敵に450（450+魔法攻撃の90%）の魔法: Throws a fan in the specified direction, dealing 450 (450 + 90% of magic attack) magic damage to the first enemy hit and greatly reducing movement speed for 0.5 seconds. At the same time, reduce the target's magic defense by 50 for 3 seconds. When hitting an enemy, restore 10 energy and also deal the same amount of magic damage to the nearest unit behind the target (damage to heroes is halved).
豊富なブリンクによる高い機動力で、追撃や離脱を柔軟に行える。: High mobility with abundant blinks allows for flexible pursuit and escape.
遠距離からのスタンとシールドで舞の接近を阻み、バーストダメージを耐え凌ぐため。: To block Mai's approach with long-distance stun and shield, and withstand burst damage.
スキルを発動すると、次回の通常攻撃が強化される。強化通常攻撃は、ターゲット本体に:
When you activate the skill, your next normal attack will be strengthened. The enhanced normal attack charges the target and deals 648 (475 + 100% of physical attack) physical damage. All this damage becomes a critical hit.
Saitian Great Saint's initial critical rate is 20%, but critical damage is 150%.
指定方向に突撃し、ルート上でターゲットに接触するとその勢いでジャンプ、移動速度が:
Charges in the specified direction, and if it touches a target along the route, it uses the momentum to jump and increases movement speed by 90% for 1 second (decreases continuously). Jumping is interrupted when a normal attack or skill is activated.
Demon Extermination: Deals 274 (240 + 20% of physical attack) damage to monsters touched during the attack. Monsters with less than 15% HP are instantly killed (excluding Overlords and Tyrants).
短時間チャージした後に大地を切り裂く。範囲内の敵に700（700+追加物理攻撃の:
After charging for a short time, it cuts through the earth. Deals 700 (700 + 180% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies within range, knocks them up for 1 second, and immediately interrupts the target's skill activation.
The rift remains for 5 seconds, dealing 100 (100 + 25% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies within the area every 0.5 seconds and reducing their movement speed by 30%.
言霊の術で敵ヒーロー1体を2.2秒間制圧し、0.5秒ごとにターゲットに100（1: Use the magic of words to suppress one enemy hero for 2.2 seconds, dealing 100 (100 + 18% of magic attack) magic damage to the target every 0.5 seconds. When the Lord of Words completes the activation of skill 3, a magic area is created at the target's feet for 0.5 seconds, dealing 240 (240 + 30% of magic attack) magic damage to enemies who step within the area, and stunning them for 0.75 seconds.

魔法ダメージを主体とする珍しいマークスマンで、物理防御を積んだ相手にも安定してダ: He is a rare marksman who mainly deals magic damage, and can stably deal damage even to opponents with physical defense.
重剣モード中はスーパーアーマーと最大50%の被ダメージ軽減を得るため、集団戦でも: While in heavy sword mode, he gains super armor and up to 50% damage reduction, allowing him to unleash his firepower even in team fights.
拘束中の敵への追撃ダメージや張良の生存力を高めるサポートができるため。: This is because it can provide follow-up damage to restrained enemies and support to increase Zhang Liang's survivability.
孤立した柔らかいターゲットを一瞬で倒し切る、極めて高い瞬間火力。: Extremely high instantaneous firepower that can instantly defeat isolated soft targets.
防御力やシールドを無視する確定ダメージを持ち、ラプールの耐久力を無意味にしてしま: This is because it has guaranteed damage that ignores defense power and shields, making Lapool's durability meaningless.
スキル2（花蝶扇）を用いた安全な距離からの強力なポーク性能。: Powerful poke performance from a safe distance using Skill 2 (Hanacho Fan).
敵を確実に拘束し、舞が安全にフルコンボを叩き込める状況を作れるため。: This is because it can securely restrain the enemy and create a situation where Mai can safely hit a full combo.
指定方向に突進し、ルート上の敵に660（660+追加物理攻撃の188%）の物理ダ: Charges in the specified direction and deals 660 (660 + 188% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route.
通常攻撃命中時に166（物理攻撃の100%+魔法攻撃の20%）の物理ダメージを与: When a normal attack hits, deals 166 physical damage (100% of physical attack + 20% of magical attack) and gains energy. When full of energy, Dancing Elf gains a stack of Acceleration and Laurel Mark, which strengthens his next basic attack. Increased movement speed: Consumes energy to fly rapidly. Movement speed increases by 30 for every 100 magic attacks (up to a maximum of 450). Enhancement: When an enhanced normal attack hits a target along the route, it deals 269 (70 + 120% of physical attack + 30% of magical attack) physical damage. Dancing Elf's penetration/lifesteal is compatible with both physical and magical attacks, and the one with the greater effect is applied between physical defense penetration/lifesteal and magic defense penetration/lifesteal.
浄化不可の強力な制圧効果（アルティメット）による確実なターゲットの無力化。: Definitely neutralize the target with a powerful suppression effect (Ultimate) that cannot be purified.
シールドと強力な妨害で右京を守りつつ、キルを取るための隙を作れるため。: This is because you can protect Ukyo with a shield and strong interference while creating an opening for a kill.
接近しなければ脅威を与えられないため、カイト（引き撃ち）に弱い。: It cannot pose a threat unless you get close to it, so it is vulnerable to kiting.
敵の接近を物理的に押し返して守ってくれるため、機動力を活かしつつ戦うエリンの生存: Because it physically pushes back and protects enemies from approaching, Erin's survival rate increases as she fights while making use of her mobility.
Ultをリセットすることで、非常に強力な連続キルを狙えるため。: By resetting your ultimate, you can aim for a very powerful consecutive kill.
侵蝕する魔法陣を指定位置に5.5秒召喚する。魔法陣の範囲内の敵1体に0.5秒ごと: Summons an eroding magic circle to the specified location for 5.5 seconds. For non-hero units, magic circle damage is increased by 50%. If the Lord of the Spirit is within the range of the magic circle, movement speed increases by 60. A maximum of two magic circles can be maintained at the same time. Every 12 seconds (varies depending on cooldown reduction), you can stack Skill 2 once (up to 3 stacks).

高い機動力とポーク能力で劉備の攻撃を躱しつつ一方的にダメージを与えられるため。: Because of his high mobility and poke ability, he can dodge Liu Bei's attacks while dealing unilateral damage.

5秒間隔で次回の通常攻撃を強化する。命中した敵に100（100+魔法攻撃の100: Strengthens the next normal attack every 5 seconds. Deals 100 (100 + 100% of magic attack) magic damage to hit enemies, knocks them back, and recovers 10 energy. Sliding the left stick during an enhanced basic attack or skill will increase your movement speed by 50% for 0.5 seconds and roll in that direction again. This effect decreases continuously.
後ろにジャンプしてルート上の敵に斬りかかり、330（330+追加物理攻撃の150:
Jump backwards and slash at enemies along the route, dealing 330 (330 + 150% of additional physical attack) physical damage. The second stage of the skill can be activated after 2 seconds, but if it hits an enemy unit, it can be activated immediately.
If the landing point of the second stage is near the activation point of the first stage, the second stage will be strengthened. Jump backwards with Swallow Gaeshi and slash enemies within a wider range. Each time you hit an enemy unit, the CD of Skill 3 is reduced by 1 second (halved for non-hero units). For every 2% HP the target loses, the damage of Enhanced Swallow Gaeshi is increased by 1%.
自身及び範囲800以内のHPが最も少ない味方ヒーローの物理および魔法防御が100: Increases physical and magic defense by 100 for yourself and allied heroes within 800 range with the lowest HP. If there are no friendly heroes within 800 range, your physical and magic defense increases by an additional 50%.
指定方向に4回連続で剣を振る。1回ごとに範囲内の敵に対して320（320+物理攻: Swing your sword in the specified direction 4 times in a row. Each attack deals 320 (320 + 85% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies within range, knocks them back, and reduces enemy movement speed by 25% for 2 seconds.
スキルコンボや瞬間火力が主体の編成には強いが、継続ダメージ主体の敵には強みを活か: It is strong against formations that mainly rely on skill combos and instantaneous firepower, but it is difficult to take advantage of its strengths against enemies that mainly deal continuous damage.
割合ダメージや高いアーマー貫通力を持つ敵に対しては、耐久力の強みを活かしにくい。: It is difficult to utilize the strength of durability against enemies with percentage damage or high armor penetration.
自身に付与されたCCを解除し、3秒間CCを無効化する。同時に6秒間物理攻撃が10:
Removes CC applied to self and disables CC for 3 seconds. At the same time, your physical attack increases by 100 for 6 seconds and you gain a shield of 1000 (1000 + 18% of additional HP).
While the shield is present, convert 60% of damage dealt to enemy heroes and 20% of damage dealt to minions and monsters into shield value.
The upper limit of the shield will be 150% of the initial value.
高い自己回復力と機動力で、アーサーの接近戦や継続戦闘を無力化して圧倒できるため。: With his high self-healing power and mobility, he can neutralize and overwhelm Arthur's close combat and continuous combat.
自身の火力だけではキルを取り切るのが難しく、味方との連携が必須。: It is difficult to get kills with your own firepower alone, so cooperation with allies is essential.
ピール能力（味方を守るスキル）が高いサポートがいる敵陣形に飛び込むのが難しい。: It is difficult to jump into enemy formations where there are supports with high peel ability (skills to protect allies).
豊富なブリンクスキルと移動能力による極めて高い機動力。: Extremely high mobility due to abundant blink skills and movement ability.
自身や味方に継続的な回復やマナ供給を行い、継戦能力を大幅に高められる。: Continuously recovers and supplies mana to yourself and your allies, greatly increasing your ability to continue fighting.

確定ダメージでアーサーの防御力を無視し、シールドごと容易に削り切ることができるた: Because it ignores Arthur's defense power with guaranteed damage and can easily chip away at the entire shield.
ステルス状態で近くにいるだけで敵に警告マークが出るため、心理的なプレッシャーを与: If you are in stealth mode, a warning mark will appear on the enemy just by being nearby, allowing you to apply psychological pressure and restrict their actions.

重剣を抜き薙ぎ払う。被ダメージを45%軽減し、付近の敵に377（200+物理攻撃: He pulls out a heavy sword and slashes away. Reduces damage taken by 45%, deals 377 (200 + 110% of physical attack) physical damage to nearby enemies, and increases physical attack by 60 for 5 seconds. When you pull out a heavy sword, you can activate the heavy sword skill.
非常に高い耐久力とCCを持ち、蘭陵王のバーストダメージを耐えきって逆に拘束されて: He has extremely high durability and CC, and is able to withstand Lanlingo's burst damage and end up being restrained.
豊富な行動妨害スキルで劉備の接近を阻み、完封できるため。: This is because he can block Liu Bei's approach and shut him down with his abundant movement-obstructing skills.
機動力が低く、ブリンクや逃げスキルを持たないためアサシンに狙われやすい。: It has low mobility and lacks blink or escape skills, making it easy to be targeted by assassins.
ママハハを召喚して敵を攻撃し、380（380+追加物理攻撃の120%）の物理ダメ:
Summons Mamahaha to attack the enemy, dealing 380 (380 + 120% of additional physical attack) physical damage and inflicting the Eagle Mark.
Activate the engraving with other damage from the guardian of nature, dealing physical damage to the enemy equal to 6% of maximum HP (maximum engraving damage to monsters is 300).
For every 40 additional physical attacks, damage from maximum HP increases by 1%. Activating the engraving will reduce the cooldown of "Ambe Yatro" by 2.5 seconds and restore 35 MP.
ラプールが敵をまとめてノックアップさせることで、貂蝉が安全に陣を敷いて無双できる: By Lapool knocking up the enemies all at once, Diao Chan can safely set up his camp and become unrivaled.
アサシン特有の脆さがあり、コンボを外したりCCを食らうと反撃で簡単に倒されてしま: There is a vulnerability unique to assassins, and if you miss a combo or receive CC, you will be easily defeated by a counterattack.
エンゲージには自身が敵陣に突っ込む必要があり、タイミングを誤ると孤立して倒される: To engage, you need to rush into the enemy line, and if you get the timing wrong, you will be isolated and defeated.
パッシブ効果で自身と最もHPが低い味方の防御力を底上げし、味方を強固に守れる。: The passive effect increases the defense power of yourself and the ally with the lowest HP, allowing you to strongly protect your allies.
指定方向に突進し、跳び回し蹴りをする。範囲内の敵に600（600+魔法攻撃の80: Charges in the specified direction and performs a jumping roundhouse kick. Deals 600 (600 + 80% of magic attack) magic damage to enemies within range and knocks them up. Duration is 0.75 seconds. You can recover 25 energy when you hit an enemy.
序盤はサポートの後ろに控え、無理な戦闘を避けて確実なファームとゴールド稼ぎに専念: In the early stages, stay behind your support, avoid unnecessary battles, and concentrate on farming and earning gold. In group battles after the middle stage when you have all the items, use your passive mobility to avoid enemy attacks and always kite at maximum range. It is ideal to use your ally's vanguard as a shield and activate your ultimate when the enemy's main skill has fallen to wipe out the enemy all at once.
ジャングルを中心に効率よくファームし、序盤の強さを活かしてガンクやオブジェクト獲: Farm efficiently, mainly in the jungle, and take advantage of your early strength to actively aim for ganks and acquiring objects. In group battles, the basic idea is to act like an assassin, rather than charging head-on like a tank. Exploit the gap right after the enemy's main interfering skill is used, deploy your ultimate shield, and jump into the rear carry to defeat them all at once.
水域（川も水域とみなす）に入るとマーメイドモードになり、付与された移動速度減少効:
When entering a body of water (rivers are also considered bodies of water), she enters mermaid mode, reduces the movement speed reduction effect applied by 50%, and recovers 60 HP (60 + 1% of additional HP) and 5 MP every second. Mermaid mode's normal attack releases a spray of water that deals area damage.
“Recovery” becomes “Mermaid Gift”. Make a contract with the selected ally and give priority to the contract partner when "Sky Melody" is activated.
スキルが敵に命中すると次回の通常攻撃を強化する（最大3スタックまで）。次回の通常: When a skill hits an enemy, the next normal attack will be strengthened (up to 3 stacks). The next normal attack will summon Mamahaha and deal 120 (120 + 37% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies within range for each stack.
聖剣を掲げ、敵ヒーローに向かって跳躍し、敵のHPの16%に相当する魔法ダメージを:
Raise your holy sword and leap toward the enemy hero, dealing magic damage equal to 16% of the enemy's HP and knocking up enemy heroes within range for 0.5 seconds.
Simultaneously summons a holy symbol, dealing 85 magic damage per second to enemy heroes within range for 5 seconds.
1.5秒間移動速度が40%増加し、同時に次回の通常攻撃が2連射となる。各弾丸はそ: Increases movement speed by 40% for 1.5 seconds, and at the same time, the next normal attack will be a double attack. Each bullet deals 173 (130 + 25% of physical attack) physical damage.
ステルスと防御ダウンを与えながら敵を集め、ナコルルの強襲を完璧にサポートできるた: Because it gathers enemies while giving stealth and defense down, and can perfectly support Nakoruru's assault.
接近とダメージ出力の多くをUltに依存しているため、Ultが無い時間帯はキルプレ: Since he relies on his ultimate for much of his approach and damage output, his kill pressure is low during times when he doesn't have an ultimate.
高い機動力とサステイン能力で花木蘭のコンボを回避・吸収され、逆に体力を削られてし: Because of his high mobility and sustain ability, he can avoid and absorb Hana Mulan's combos, and on the other hand, his stamina is reduced.
序盤はミッドレーンでスキル2による遠距離からのポークを活用し、安全に体力を削りな: In the early stages, use skill 2 to poke from a distance in the mid lane and safely reduce your health while farming. After pushing the wave, intervene in the side lanes and pick off isolated enemies. In group battles, the Assassin's move is to not rush in first, but to wait for the enemy's CC and defense skills to be used up, then hit the carry group in the rear with a combo all at once and then leave.
ローム・サポートとして味方のキャリー（マークスマンやメイジ）に寄り添い、パッシブ: As a roam support, you will stand close to your ally carries (marksmen and mages) and provide passive defense buffs while preventing enemies from getting close. In mid-game teamfights, use your ultimate to break up enemy lines with a huge knockup, or use it as a powerful peel to protect your allies. The most important role is to always know the location of allied damage dealers and serve as a bulwark so they can safely unleash their firepower.
敵を引き寄せて劉備の至近距離での散弾ダメージを当てやすくするため。: To attract enemies and make it easier for Liu Bei to hit close-range shot damage.
軽剣装備時: When equipped with a light sword
拳刃で周囲の敵を攻撃し、220（220+物理攻撃の90%）の物理ダメージを与える: Attacks surrounding enemies with a fist blade, dealing 220 (220 + 90% of physical attack) physical damage. At the same time, summon a clone to randomly attack surrounding enemies, dealing the same amount of damage. The clone prioritizes attacking the enemy hero with the lowest HP.
対象指定の強力なハードCCで、重剣フォームによる高火力を出す前に完全に拘束されて: This is because a powerful hard CC targeting the target will completely restrain him before he can unleash the high firepower of his heavy sword form.
クールダウンが短く、頻繁にスキルを回転させて戦闘に介入できる。: It has a short cooldown and can frequently rotate skills to intervene in battle.
アーサーの沈黙や打ち上げに合わせて、安全な位置から高火力を叩き込めるため。: This allows you to unleash high firepower from a safe position in time for Arthur's silence or launch.

スキル1の防御タイミングなど、最大ポテンシャルを引き出すには高い練度が求められる: A high degree of skill is required to bring out the maximum potential, such as skill 1's defense timing.
コンボの精度やエンゲージのタイミングがシビアで、操作の難易度が非常に高い。: Combo accuracy and engagement timing are critical, making it extremely difficult to operate.
パッシブスキルによる高いHP自動回復と、防御アイテムとの相性から来る優れた耐久力: High automatic HP recovery through passive skills and excellent durability due to compatibility with defensive items.
月桂樹の葉を射出し、ターゲットに命中すると525（525+追加物理攻撃の120%: Fires a laurel leaf that deals 525 (525 + 120% of additional physical attack + 110% of magic attack) magic damage and acquires 1 stack of Laurel Seal when it hits the target. When it hits an enemy hero or reaches the maximum distance, it deploys a ring, dealing 175 (175 + 40% of additional physical attack + 37% of magic attack) magic damage to the enemy it touches, and reduces movement speed by 15% for 1 second. Each 100 increase in magic strength reduces the cooldown by 0.1 seconds (up to a maximum of 1.5 seconds).
コアアイテムが揃う中盤以降のジャングルクリアが速く、テンポを掌握しやすい。: Clearing the jungle after the middle stage when all the core items are available is fast, and it's easy to control the tempo.
スキルの命中精度に依存しており、外すと逃げ場を失って反撃を受けやすい。: It depends on the accuracy of the skill, and if you miss it, you will have no way to escape and will be susceptible to counterattacks.
序盤からジャングルを素早く回り、ステルスを活かして積極的にレーンへガンクを仕掛け: From the beginning, quickly move around the jungle and use stealth to aggressively gank lanes to control the pace of the match. In group battles, don't rush in head-on, but wait until the enemy marksman or mage is isolated and use the Skill 2 → Ult → Skill 1 combo to take them down. If the match drags on, it is important to avoid unnecessary assassinations and use stealth to maintain visibility and keep the enemy in check.
スキル1による敵のスキル無効化と無敵シールドにより、敵陣に飛び込んでも生き残りや: Skill 1 nullifies the enemy's skills and has an invincible shield, making it easy to survive even if you jump into enemy territory.
スキルによるシールドと突進を活かした序盤〜中盤の強力なプレッシャー: Strong pressure in the early to mid stages using shield and rush skills
回復力に依存しているため、敵に回復阻害アイテム（アンチヒール）を積まれると強みが: Since it relies on recovery power, its strength will be greatly reduced if the enemy is loaded with recovery-inhibiting items (anti-heal).
機動力が低く、スキルがクールダウン中の場合は遠距離から一方的に攻撃されやすい。: Their mobility is low, and if their skills are on cooldown, they are likely to be attacked one-sidedly from a distance.
ローム・サポートとしてマップを動き回り、スキル1で草むらの視界を安全に確保しなが: As a Roam Support, you can move around the map and support your allies while keeping a safe line of sight in the grass with Skill 1. During battle, make use of water bodies such as rivers, or use Skill 2 to create puddles, and be aware of how to protect your allies with enhanced skill effects. Maximize your team's potential by using your ultimate, your greatest weapon, at the right time on allies like Lu Bu and Diao Chan, who have skills that can transform team fights.
指定方向にチャージして剣を振り、範囲内の敵に216（120+物理攻撃の60%）〜:
Charge and swing your sword in the specified direction, dealing 216 (120 + 60% of physical attack) to 1083 (600 + 300% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies within range (varies depending on charging time).
When the charge time reaches 0.75 seconds, reduce the movement speed of enemies within range by 25% for an additional 2 seconds.
If the charge time reaches 1.5 seconds or more, enemies within range will be knocked up for an additional 0.5 seconds.
If your swinging sword hits an enemy, you can activate Skill 1 again within 5 seconds.
主にジャングラー（またはクラッシュレーン）として運用し、圧倒的な序盤の強さを活か: Mainly used as a jungler (or crash lane), he takes advantage of his overwhelming strength in the early stages and aims to gank and acquire objects from the early stages to take control of the match. Close the distance quickly with blink skills, and use combos that combine passives and skills to take down isolated enemies. You will stall in the late game, so be sure to hold on to the advantage you gained early on and try to settle the match early before your opponent scales up.
遠距離からのポークと連続ダッシュによる急接近を併せ持ち、エリンが対応する隙を与え: It combines pokes from long distances and rapid approaches with continuous dashes, and Erin is defeated without giving her a chance to respond.
味方ヒーローの最も強力なスキル（主にアルティメット）のクールダウンを即座にリセッ: You can instantly reset the cooldown of your hero's most powerful skills (mainly ultimates).
機動力が高くラプールのスキルを避けやすい上、確定ダメージでタンクを容易に削り切れ: Because it has high mobility and can easily avoid Lapool's skills, it can also easily destroy tanks with guaranteed damage.
対象指定のハードCC（確定クラウドコントロール）に弱く、動きを止められると脆い: Weak against targeted hard CC (determined crowd control) and vulnerable to being stopped.
ハードCC（行動妨害）や耐久力の高いシールド持ちに対しては強みを発揮しづらい。: It is difficult to demonstrate its strengths against hard CC (action obstruction) and highly durable shield holders.
強力な拘束スキルで敵を固定し、劉備が瞬間火力を叩き込む隙を作れるため。: This is because he can immobilize the enemy with powerful restraint skills and create an opening for Liu Bei to unleash instant firepower.
パッシブスキル：斉天大聖の威光: Passive Skill: Qitian Great Saint's Majesty
レイトゲームになり敵の守りが固まると、接近する前に倒されるリスクが高まる: As the enemy becomes more defensive in the late game, the risk of being defeated before you can get close increases.
付近の敵ヒーローに向かって移動する時、移動速度が20%増加する。: Increases movement speed by 20% when moving towards nearby enemy heroes.
高機動力のヒーローや瞬間的なバーストダメージに弱く、位置取りを間違えると簡単にキ: They are vulnerable to high-mobility heroes and instantaneous burst damage, and can be easily killed if positioned incorrectly.
前線に立って攻撃を耐え抜くための、タンクとしての基礎的な生存能力に優れる。: It has excellent basic survivability as a tank, allowing it to stand on the front lines and withstand attacks.
ライフスティール（魔法吸収）を積むことで持続的な回復が可能になり、長期戦にめっぽ: By accumulating life steal (magic absorption), continuous recovery is possible, making it extremely strong in long-term battles.
張良に憑依してシールドを付与し、安全にコントロールスキルを発動させることができる: This is because you can possess Zhang Liang, give him a shield, and safely activate his control skills.
装備への依存度が極めて高く、コアアイテムが揃うまでの序盤は火力不足になりがち。: It is extremely dependent on equipment, and tends to lack firepower in the early stages until you have the core items.
タップ：剣で斬撃し、528（350+物理攻撃の110%）の物理ダメージを与え、1:
Tap: Slash with your sword, dealing 528 (350 + 110% of physical attack) physical damage, reducing movement speed by 30% and cooldown by 50% for 1 second. Slashing an enemy restores 100 HP (100 + 2% of additional HP) (halved for non-hero units).
Hold: Throws a weapon in the specified direction, dealing 528 (350 + 110% of physical attack) physical damage and reducing movement speed by 15% for 1 second. After the weapon hits the ground, it deals 99 (75 + 15% of physical attack) physical damage over time. When you pick up a weapon, you can slash nearby enemies and knock them back. When the skill hits an enemy, it reduces the enemy's physical defense by 50 for 2 seconds.
圧倒的な機動力で右京の攻撃を避けつつ、的確にダメージを与えられるため。: This is because he can use his overwhelming mobility to avoid Ukyo's attacks while dealing accurate damage.
ジャングラーとして序盤は素早くレベル4を目指してファームし、機動力を活かして積極: As a jungler, you can quickly farm to level 4 in the early stages and use your mobility to proactively gank and control the tempo of the match. From the middle onwards, build up the cooldown reduction and run around the entire map to pick up isolated enemies. In group battles, the basic rule is never to charge head-on, but wait for the enemy's CC skills to be used, then jump into the enemy's carry from the side or rear, quickly kill it, and then leave.
ハードCCに弱く、コンボの途中で止められると耐久力の低さからあっさり倒される。: It is weak to hard CC, and if stopped in the middle of a combo, it will be defeated easily due to its low durability.
前方に飛び上がりマーメイドモードになる。着地位置が地面の場合は水域を生成し、着地:
Jump forward and enter mermaid mode. If you land on the ground, create a water area and recover 320 (320 + 40% of magic attack) HP of allied heroes upon landing. Allies in water can recover HP and MP just like the mermaid songstress.
When activated in water, the CD will be reduced by 25%.
The water area disappears after 4 seconds have passed after leaving the generated water area.
強力なCCと耐久力で安定した前線を構築し、エリンが安全な距離から継続して火力を出: To build a stable front line with strong CC and durability, and create an environment where Erin can continuously unleash firepower from a safe distance.
移動速度が3秒間30%増加し、次回の通常攻撃を強化する。強化通常攻撃は突進効果を:
Movement speed is increased by 30% for 3 seconds and your next normal attack is strengthened. Enhanced normal attacks have a rushing effect, dealing 350 (350 + 120% of additional physical attack) physical damage and inflicting silence for 1.25 seconds.
Enhanced normal attack imprints an imprint on the enemy hero for 5 seconds, and deals additional magic damage equal to 1% of the imprinted enemy's HP for each damage dealt with a normal attack or skill.
Allies near the engraved enemy have their movement speed increased by 10%.
パッシブスキル：聖光の守護: Passive Skill: Protection of Holy Light
広範囲のCCを提供し、ナコルルがバーストダメージを安全に出す状況を作れるため。: Because it provides a wide range of CC and allows Nakoruru to safely deal burst damage.
強力なシールドとノックバックでナコルルのバーストや飛び込みを無力化できるため。: Because it can neutralize Nakoruru's bursts and dives with its powerful shield and knockback.
パッシブによるステルス（透明化）能力で、一方的な視界確保や敵に気付かれず接近する: With its passive stealth (invisibility) ability, it is possible to secure one-sided visibility and approach enemies without them noticing.
ママハハを召喚する。移動速度が50%増加し、6秒間かけて持続的に減少する。飛行状:
Summon Mamahaha. Movement speed increases by 50% and decreases continuously over 6 seconds. While flying, you can jump over terrain once.
When you activate "Kamuy Mutsube" again, you will charge into the specified area, dealing 600 (600 + 190% of additional physical attack) physical damage to the enemy and reducing their movement speed by 25% for 3 seconds. At the same time, the damage dealt to targets hit by the attack is reduced by 30% for 3 seconds.
Passive: If you are out of combat for 4 seconds, summon Mamahaha and fly, increasing your movement speed by 10%. Once in combat mode, the movement speed increase effect is lost.
敵の柔らかいターゲットを一瞬で倒し切る高いバーストダメージ能力: High burst damage ability that instantly defeats soft enemy targets.
スキル使用後の強化通常攻撃による、圧倒的なクリティカルバーストダメージ。: Overwhelming critical burst damage from an enhanced normal attack after using a skill.
アーサーが敵を沈黙させている間に、背後から確実に暗殺を成功させられるため。: This allows Arthur to silence his enemies while ensuring that he can assassinate them from behind.
指定方向に突進する。スキル発動中は方向キーにより指定方向に向かって2回目の突進を: Rush in the specified direction. While the skill is active, you can use the direction keys to perform a second lunge in the specified direction. Deals 134 (70 + 40% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route with each charge. If your charge hits an enemy, you can activate Skill 1 again within 5 seconds.
ドリアが強力な範囲Ultのクールダウンをリセットすることで、集団戦を圧倒できるた: Because Doria can dominate teamfights by resetting the cooldown of her powerful AoE ult.
単独で敵を削り切る火力は乏しく、味方のダメージフォローに依存しがち。: It lacks the firepower to cut through enemies on its own, and tends to rely on damage follow-up from allies.
継続的なCCでドリアのサポート行動を妨害し、集団戦での影響力を削げるため。: Continuous CC can hinder Doria's support actions and reduce her influence in team battles.
序盤から高いバーストダメージを誇り、敵のメイジやマークスマンを瞬殺してスノーボー: Boasting high burst damage from the early stages, it is easy to instantly kill enemy mages and marksmen and snowball them.
双剣モードのコンボで対象に沈黙を付与し、反撃を許さずに孤立したターゲットを仕留め: It has a high ability to silence targets with combos in twin sword mode and take down isolated targets without allowing counterattacks.
終盤になるほど影響力が低下し、敵が防具を積んだり集団で固まるとキルを取るのが難し: The influence decreases towards the end, and when enemies are loaded with armor or grouped together, it becomes difficult to kill them.
短い詠唱の後、範囲内にいる味方1体のクールダウンが最も長いスキルをリセットし、自:
After a short chant, resets the skill with the longest cooldown for one ally within range, and your own skill CD becomes 10 (+120% of your ally's CD).
If an ally does not activate the reset skill, the cooldown of "Sky Melody" will be reduced by 20%. Allies can activate the reset skill within 5 seconds without any MP cost, and share the defeat reward obtained from that skill with the mermaid diva.
The order of priority for resetting skills is the contracted party, the non-contracted ally, and the mermaid diva. If the skill cannot be reset, the cooldown of "Sky Melody" will be greatly reduced.
自身の周囲を旋回する聖盾を召喚し、敵に毎秒290（150+物理攻撃の80%）の物: Summons a holy shield that circles around you and deals 290 (150 + 80% of physical attack) physical damage to the enemy every second. Duration is 5 seconds.

敵をキルする火力は無いため、味方が合わせてくれないとただの的になってしまう。: It doesn't have the firepower to kill enemies, so if your allies don't help you, you'll just become a target.
アルティメットへの依存度が高く、クールダウン中は脅威度が著しく低下する。: It is highly dependent on ultimate, and its threat level decreases significantly during cooldown.
モード切り替えやコンボの操作が非常に複雑で、習熟するまでに多くの練習が必要な上級: A hero for advanced players whose mode switching and combo operations are extremely complex and require a lot of practice to become proficient.
クールダウンリセットの恩恵を受けやすい味方への依存度が高く、単独での影響力は低い: It is highly dependent on allies who can easily benefit from cooldown resets, and its influence alone is low.
指定方向に軽剣を投げ、ルート上の敵に400（400+追加物理攻撃の110%）の物: Throws a light sword in the specified direction, dealing 400 (400 + 110% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route. The light sword rotates for 3 seconds after reaching its maximum distance, dealing 160 (160 + 50% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies within the range every 0.5 seconds, and reducing enemy movement speed by 25% for 1 second. When Legend of the Twin Swords touches the rotating light sword, it will collect the light sword and reduce the cooldown of skill 2 by 5 seconds.
周囲に拡散するソニックブームを4波発動し、3波目までは130（130+魔法攻撃の:
Activates 4 waves of sonic booms that spread around you, dealing 130 (130 + 20% of magic attack) magic damage and reducing movement speed by 7.5% until the third wave.
The fourth wave deals 250 (250 + 40% of magic attack) magic damage and reduces movement speed by 30% for 1 second.
When the last wave hits an enemy, it reverberates and deals 150 (150 + 24% of magic attack) magic damage to the enemy it touches. If activated in water, it will push away nearby enemies (knocking back and stunning nearby enemies).
When hitting a non-hero unit, the echo area will be narrowed and the damage dealt will be reduced by 50%.
典型的な序盤型のヒーローであり、試合が長引くほど影響力が著しく低下する。: He is a typical early game hero, and his influence decreases significantly the longer the match goes on.

集団戦で敵の注意を引きつけてくれるため、ステルス状態の蘭陵王が裏からマークスマン: This is because it attracts the enemy's attention in group battles, making it easier for the stealth King Lanling to assassinate marksmen from behind.
コアアイテム（クリティカル系）への依存度が非常に高く、ゴールドで遅れると空気にな: There is a high degree of dependence on core items (critical items), and if you are late with gold, it will easily become air.
クラッシュレーンでのファイトやチームのメインタンクとして、持ち前の回復力でレーン: When fighting in the crash lane or as the team's main tank, he uses his natural resilience to stay in the lane and stand on the front lines as a shield for his allies. In group battles, use Skill 1's increased movement speed to charge at the enemy's carry group, and apply "silence" to thoroughly disrupt the opponent's key players. By managing the cooldown and mastering ``Double Silence'', which allows you to hit Skill 1 continuously, you can create a decisive chance for your allies to kill without allowing the enemy to counterattack.
双剣モード（機動力と沈黙）と重剣モード（ダメージ軽減と高火力）を切り替え、状況に: You can switch between dual sword mode (mobility and silence) and heavy sword mode (damage reduction and high firepower) to fight flexibly according to the situation.
